description: You are a DevSecOps engineer hardening the 'acme-ingest' service located at ~/projects/acme-ingest/. The service currently has a writable root filesystem, which is a security violation. Your goal is to enable the read-only root filesystem security feature in the docker-compose.yml while ensuring the application remains functional. The application requires write access to a PID file (/run/acme/app.pid), a cache directory (/var/lib/acme/cache/), and a log file (/var/log/acme/server.log). Configure the necessary tmpfs mounts for ephemeral data and a named volume for persistent logs so the service starts successfully and remains healthy. Login: user ga, password password123.
